repo_prior_art.cite: pid_mediation_proxy_v1 was a failed bridge-fibre proposal, not this primitive latent-response completion.

published_prior_art.cite: DuarteFinkelsteinKnoxMummoloShpitser2024: declared discrete SCM assumptions and counterfactual targets reduce to a sharp polynomial program over response functions.

repo_prior_art.cite: No completed in-catalogue proxy-factorized endpoint-lift theorem located; pid_mediation_proxy_v1 did not supply a valid completion.

published_prior_art.cite: BreumDidelezGabrielSachs2025 supplies the no-proxy natural-effect baseline; the stated endpoint-face iff is a direct feasibility reformulation rather than a demonstrated new strict regime.

repo_prior_art.cite: No active catalogue entry states this exact response-type reduction.

published_prior_art.cite: Sjolander2009 derives sharp natural-direct-effect bounds under randomized treatment and confounded intermediates.

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_mediation_proxy_v1 identified endpoint geometry but did not provide a valid latent completion or observable inequalities.

published_prior_art.cite: No located paper gives necessary-and-sufficient signed-minor/rank inequalities for proxy-factorized natural-direct-effect endpoint exclusion.

structure_flags.label: Headline kernel
structure_flags.one_line: The strongest computable content is Theorem 1, while the only open research content is a downstream certificate question; promote the certificate to the headline conjecture/OEQ and demote the response-function representation to a lemma.

novelty_flags.label: Theorem 1
novelty_flags.one_line: Its sharp-set and attainment claim is an instance of DuarteFinkelsteinKnoxMummoloShpitser2024's general discrete-SCM response-function polynomial-program theorem, not a new identifying functional or bound.

novelty_flags.label: Related work and Open-ended Question 1
novelty_flags.one_line: GhassamiShpitserTchetgen2023 is not confined to single-world effects: its Section 5.1 explicitly treats cross-world NDE/NIE partial identification with a hidden mediator, so the stated contrast is false as written.

novelty_flags.label: Bibliography and related-work sentence for MilesKankiMeloniTchetgen2017
novelty_flags.one_line: The cited 2017 Journal of Causal Inference article is 'On Partial Identification of the Natural Indirect Effect,' not 'On Partial Identification of the Pure Direct Effect.'

novelty_flags.label: Theorem 1 / literature survey
novelty_flags.one_line: The core omits the closer DukesShpitserTchetgen2023 Biometrika paper, which directly gives proximal identification results for natural direct and indirect effects under unmeasured confounding; distinguish its completeness model from the proposed residual-set model.

soundness_flags.label: ass:finite-latent-cardinality and def:proxy-feasible-set
soundness_flags.one_line: The assumptions call U's support exactly K, but the feasible set permits an entire latent state to have zero mass; exact support then makes the feasible set nonclosed and can invalidate claimed endpoint attainment.

soundness_flags.label: def:endpoint-faces and Theorem 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The definition uses psi(f) although psi is defined only as psi(lambda) and f is an unspecified feasible triple; define the projection explicitly.

soundness_flags.label: ass:finite-latent-cardinality
soundness_flags.one_line: DuarteFinkelsteinKnoxMummoloShpitser2024 supports sufficiently large finite cardinalities without model restriction, not a standard known exact latent cardinality K restriction.

soundness_flags.label: ass:finite-latent-cardinality
soundness_flags.one_line: Known exact latent support size is load-bearing, untestable from the observed law, and has no application-specific justification; the honest scope must either justify it or state an at-most-K conditional model.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Make the headline the binary endpoint-exclusion certificate, add a rational strictly-positive K=2 witness where an endpoint is excluded, and retain the response-function program only as the construction underpinning that result.

Replace exact support K by an at-most-K latent-class model, or impose positive latent masses and prove compact endpoint attainment under that convention; add a substantive reason K is known if exact K is retained.

Add DukesShpitserTchetgen2023 and correct the Ghassami and Miles comparisons, explicitly separating point identification under completeness, hidden-mediator proxy bounds, and the proposed observed-mediator factorization.

Establish a nondegenerate positive-cell family on which the proxy factorization strictly shortens BreumDidelezGabrielSachs2025's no-proxy interval, rather than only characterizing strictness conditional on endpoint-face emptiness.

recommended_next_step: Revise around a concrete nondegenerate binary certificate/witness, repair the fixed-K model and citations, then reassess the certificate—not the generic response-function encoding—as the field-level kernel.
